explanation: This command simulates the UAC bypass using wusa.exe by using equivalent syntax (e.g., /q instead of /quiet) and environment variables for user-specific paths. It aligns with the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command simulates the Dism.exe-based UAC bypass by using equivalent syntax (e.g., /q instead of /quiet) and aligns with the Sigma rule's detection criteria for the parent process.
